intro:
Initially I think I'm in bed, and this fact is confusing. No matter what black-out blinds or reinforced curtains we've put up in the window, some street light always gets through. But this room is black. 

I then notice that I can't move. I can feel some kind of frame keeping my head pointing in one direction, and my legs and hands are held fast. I'm not horizontal either - I'm strapped to something, held up and bound to a board. My arms are bent at the elbow, and I move my fingertips. I can feel some kind of keyboard underneath them. 

It is at this point that I begin to panic. I pull my body one way and the other and notice - whatever I'm attached to isn't rigid. I can feel it move. Without thinking I shout "help! help!". No response. I smash the keys under my fingertips. There is a loud noise, like a breaker switch being flipped. My eyes are dazzled by a bright light.
